name: No Name Sandwich
tagline: Word-of-mouth banh mi shop on Waialae — the name tells you everything about the vibe.
mustOrder: classic banh mi — proper baguette, pickled veg, cilantro, jalapeño
try whatever daily special is on the board
talkStory: A banh mi shop literally called No Name Sandwich — the kind of place you hear about from a friend, not a guidebook. Fresh baguettes, proper Vietnamese fillings, very low prices. Complements Lee's Bakery in Chinatown — two different neighborhoods, same genre, both beloved by locals. Waialae Ave location keeps it firmly in the Kaimuki local orbit. Closed Tuesdays. Opens 10am Wed–Mon.
